item.title: anasty17 / mirror-leech-telegram-bot
item.description:
Desc: Official Repository: Telegram bot which can download torrents, mega, google drive, telegram file and direct links + all yt-dlp supported sites, then upload them to google drive or telegram cloud. This bot supports more features like zip or extract before upload, seed after upload using qBittorrent or aria2c and many more, read features below.
Lang: Python
Star: 2329

item.title: PaddlePaddle / PaddleSpeech
item.description:
Desc: Easy-to-use Speech Toolkit including Self-Supervised Learning model, SOTA/Streaming ASR with punctuation, Streaming TTS with text frontend, Speaker Verification System, End-to-End Speech Translation and Keyword Spotting. Won NAACL2022 Best Demo Award.
Lang: Python
Star: 6865

item.title: PINTO0309 / PINTO_model_zoo
item.description:
Desc: A repository for storing models that have been inter-converted between various frameworks. Supported frameworks are TensorFlow, PyTorch, ONNX, OpenVINO, TFJS, TFTRT, TensorFlowLite (Float32/16/INT8), EdgeTPU, CoreML.
Lang: Python
